ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-17-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report
Off Calendar Jun-05-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Geoffrey Adams appeared by zoom in propria persona.

The court recalled what was stated at the last calling of the case and noted that there has been no action since the last hearing. Mr. Adams stated that three of the beneficiaries signed waivers of the accounting, that the last waiver is with the legal department of Planned Parenthood for review and requested a one-week continuance so that he can file all four waivers together. Mr. Adams also stated that all of the beneficiaries are institutions. The First Account and Report is off calendar. Status on close of estate is set for July 17, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: W. James. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report
Off Calendar Apr-29-2024 Continued To Jun-05-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Geoffrey Adams appeared by zoom in propria persona.

Mr. Adams stated that all four of the beneficiaries have waived an accounting and that he expects to have the waivers this week. The First Account and Report, etc. is continued to June 5, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report
Off Calendar Mar-25-2024 Continued To Apr-29-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Geoffrey Charles Adams appeared via zoom in pro per.

Mr. Adams stated that he is working on getting the accounting waives and will need a one-month continuance. First account and report is continued to April 29, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-20-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-29-2022 Continued To Dec-20-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Geoffrey Addams in propria persona.

The court noted that on the 25th Mr. Adams said that the petition was nearly ready. Mr. Adams stated that the accounting is ready, that there are a couple of matters that need to be clarified, that he has to talk to the accountant and that there were some bank statements from Wells Fargo that he didn't have that he cleared up yesterday. Mr. Adams also explained that when he opted to go paperless on his personal accounts, Wells Fargo also included this account, and stated that he is ready to complete this and that the petition will be filed within a week. In addition, Mr. Adams stated that the accounting is from June 24, 2015 through September 30, 2022. The court informed Mr. Adams about the court's backlog of trials, about resources being diverted and stated it does not have a lot of resources to call matters like this more than once. The court also raised the issue of ordering two-year accountings, but noted that it does not have a petition. Status on close of the estate is continued to December 20, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If the petition is filed by December 13th, no appearance will be required.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-25-2022 Continued To Nov-29-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Geoffrey C. Adams, in court, in propria persona, Executor.

Mr. Adams reports on the issues causing delays with this matter and advises that he is working with an accountant to prepare an accounting which will accompany a petition and that the estate is almost ready to be closed. The court advises counsel that it will be expecting him to file either a petition for final distribution or a petition to approve status of administration, along with an accounting, by the next calling of this matter.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Nov-29-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
